packageRules.description: Keep base-image tags pinned to a digest.
TAILSCALE_VERSION ARG: only stable releases. Tailscale uses EVEN minor versions for stable (v1.98.x); ODD minors (v1.99.x) are unstable, so filter to even minors and ignore pre-releases.
Automerge all stable Tailscale releases (patch AND minor) once the PR build passes.
Automerge PATCH-only bumps of build components (Go/Alpine/busybox) once the PR build passes; review minor/major manually.
Automerge base-image digest refreshes (same tag, new sha256) once the PR build passes.
